notes: 1/11 exon off dominant scaffold but single-copy (no paralog to chimerize)
scaffold N50=1.5kb (shattered); C9A reconstructed across ~10 contigs; C9B unrecoverable; curated C9A could itself be a mosaic

C9A + C9B both functional. C9B was mis-called a 25-stop pseudogene; SRA-read blast (2026-07-02) showed a ~5 bp assembly-deletion frameshift and corrected it to an intact 583-aa ORF. Two functional copies.

C9A re-derived from isolated contiguous Copy-1 = 100% identical to finalized -> NOT a chimera (self-blast coords scattered only because Copy-1/Copy-2 are near-identical tandem duplicates). C9B = near-intact 2nd copy, exon 1 in assembly gap (was mis-called a 5-exon pseudogene).
